components.name: Voltage Regulator (Buck Converter)
components.description: A DC-to-DC buck converter that steps down a higher input voltage to a stable lower output voltage efficiently.

components.name: Camera Module (e.g., OV7670 or Raspberry Pi Camera)
components.description: A digital image sensor module that captures VGA-resolution video frames at up to 30 fps and is used in robotics, AI, and machine learning applications for tasks such as object detection, motion detection, and facial recognition.

components.name: IMU (Inertial Measurement Unit, e.g., MPU6050)
components.description: Measures a body's specific force, angular rate, and sometimes the magnetic field, using a combination of accelerometers, gyroscopes, and sometimes magnetometers.

components.name: Foot End-Caps
components.description: Protective caps designed to be attached to the feet of a robot, providing stability and preventing damage to surfaces.

components.name: CAN Bus Cabling and Connectors
components.description: Provides cabling and connectors for CAN bus communication in robotic systems.

components.name: Mounting Hardware (screws, washers, pins)
components.description: Mounting hardware such as screws, washers, and pins are used to mechanically fasten and secure robotic components.

components.name: Power Distribution Board
components.description: A board that distributes electrical power from a source to various components within a robotic system.

components.name: GPS Module
components.description: A GPS module provides geolocation and precise timing data for robotic and drone navigation systems.

components.name: Power Supply (24V DC)
components.description: A switching power supply that converts AC input to a regulated 24 VDC output at 4.5A/100W for powering industrial automation components.

components.name: Limit Switches
components.description: Limit switches are electromechanical sensors that detect the presence or absence of an object by making physical contact, used to define travel boundaries or safety stops in robotic systems.

components.name: Mounting Hardware (screws, nuts, standoffs)
components.description: Mechanical fasteners and hardware used to physically assemble and secure components in robotic and mechanical builds.

components.name: Build a Robotic Dog
components.description: A 3D printed quadrupedal robot dog designed for dynamic movements and realistic appearance.
